title: QuickQuit
description: Allows closing Minecraft during the Forge resource loading screen when starting the game.
body: # QuickQuit Allows closing Minecraft during the Forge resource loading screen when starting the game. This uses the same method that newer versions of Forge use for newer Minecraft versions, but backported using Mixins. ## Modpack? If you want to use my mods in a Modpack, I ask that the modpack is only available on Modrinth. Feel free to reach out to me if you would like to discuss further.
